title: Deconvolution of Focal Segmental Glomerulosclerosis Pathophysiology Using Transcriptomics Techniques.
author: Deleersnijder D Van Craenenbroeck AH Sprangers B
content:
S-EPMC9677714 PMC9677714 Deconvolution of Focal Segmental Glomerulosclerosis Pathophysiology Using Transcriptomics Techniques.

Background

Focal segmental glomerulosclerosis is a histopathological pattern of renal injury and comprises a heterogeneous group of clinical conditions
